message:
fix(abi): set tm_gmtoff and tm_zone in write_tm for Python/Ruby compatibility

write_tm was not setting the glibc extension fields tm_gmtoff and tm_zone
in struct tm, leaving them as uninitialized garbage. Python's time module
checks tm_gmtoff and rejects invalid values with "RuntimeError: invalid
GMT offset", preventing import of time/threading/logging modules.

Set tm_gmtoff = 0 (UTC) and tm_zone = "UTC" for all broken-down time results.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
